title: I am in Love with Shinji
display_title: I am in Love with Shinji
wikitext:
[]: I am in Love with Shinji             Quote Post by OKOptimistic » Thu Dec 03, 2020 5:39 am I had a dream the other night and I realized... I can't stop thinking about Shinji. He is so handsome... I love his beautiful big blue eyes, his luscious hair from the back, and his egg shaped soft baby face. He dresses nicely: collared shirt, belt, black pants, white shoes. He is kind and insecure in a cute kind of way and I get turned on when he goes on his mental breakdowns. The fact that he is small and short and could have bipolar disorder makes me even more in love with him. I remember the first time I watched EVA I already loved him after the first frame of him with his forearms holding the phone and his watch... Also the fact that he pilots the EVA and no one can have him... I just want to ruin his life. I've seen other anime guys but they are quite dull and cliche compared to Shinji. Sorry but am I the only one who has these thoughts?

[]: Re: I am in Love with Shinji             Quote Post by ErgoProxy » Thu Dec 03, 2020 7:52 am I'm not gay, so no, Shinji's could not become my husbando. I could fall in love with Midori though, for her fussy personality, for her expressive face, and for her bravery. The bravest person on board is always the one scared the most, as she has to bring herself more courage than anyone else from the crew to keep her battlestation manned. And I agree with her about plugsuits. I could also cherish a desire for Mari, but mere desire is meh.

[]: Re: I am in Love with Shinji             Quote Post by Berserker » Thu Dec 03, 2020 9:08 am thread/18913/Best-boy/ Here, you can praise Shinji all you want in this thread, if this makes things any better.

[]: I am in Love with Shinji             Quote Post by OKOptimistic » Thu Dec 03, 2020 5:39 am I had a dream the other night and I realized... I can't stop thinking about Shinji. He is so handsome... I love his beautiful big blue eyes, his luscious hair from the back, and his egg shaped soft baby face. He dresses nicely: collared shirt, belt, black pants, white shoes. He is kind and insecure in a cute kind of way and I get turned on when he goes on his mental breakdowns. The fact that he is small and short and could have bipolar disorder makes me even more in love with him. I remember the first time I watched EVA I already loved him after the first frame of him with his forearms holding the phone and his watch... Also the fact that he pilots the EVA and no one can have him... I just want to ruin his life. I've seen other anime guys but they are quite dull and cliche compared to Shinji. Sorry but am I the only one who has these thoughts?
